The '''Battle of Shumari''' was a large-scale battle between [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] survivors of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], which took place on [[Shumari]].

==The battle==
The Empire had placed several [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] in orbit around the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and subjected it to heavy [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]]. Meanwhile, a battle was being fought planetside between [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and an army of various types of Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] under the command of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Vader singlehandedly killed several Jedi, while others fell victim to stormtrooper fire and the planetary bombardment.

==Duel with a Dark Lord==
[[File:JediAndVader-PerfectEvil.jpg|thumb|left|The [[Unidentified Sullustan Jedi|Sullustan Jedi]] discovers [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and informs his [[Unidentified Twi'lek Jedi (Battle of Shumari)|fellow Jedi]].]]

At some point during the battle, a [[Unidentified Sullustan Jedi|Sullustan Jedi]] discovered Vader and informed a group of fellow Jedi, consisting of a [[Unidentified bearded Human Jedi|Human Jedi]], a [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] Jedi, a [[Unidentified Twi'lek Jedi (Battle of Shumari)|Twi'lek Jedi]], and [[Tao (Sith Apprentice)|Tao]], among others. The group immediately attacked Vader, but the duel was short, as Vader easily defeated all of them except the [[Human/Legends|Human]] Jedi and Tao.

Having witnessed the death of his fellow Jedi, the Human Jedi swore to make Vader pay for what he had done and attacked him. Vader, however, easily killed the Jedi, using an effective counter attack.

==Aftermath==
Eventually, the Jedi were all killed, except Tao, and Shumari had been completely devastated in the planetary bombardment and rendered uninhabitable. Vader had spared Tao's life, because he sensed the anger within Tao, and took him as his second secret [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]].

Tao and Vader returned to the devastated planet in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], where Tao would save Vader's life, just before dying from fatal wounds.

==Behind the scenes==
This battle only appears in the story ''[[Perfect Evil]]'', which spanned [[Star Wars comic books|issues]] [[Star Wars Manga: Black|Black]] and [[Star Wars Manga: Silver|Silver]] of [[Tokyopop's Star Wars Manga|''Star Wars Manga'']]. Originally published in Japan, those stories were considered to be of "fuzzy" continuity by Lucasfilm.<ref>{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=980#15895005|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-11-06|time=6:03 PM}}</ref> Since then, they have been republished in English in the United Kingdom under [[Infinities]] label, which established the material in them as [[Canon|non-canonical]]. The planet [[Shumari]] has been later referenced in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', which included the [[Shumari system/Legends|Shumari system]] in its appendix. However, according to [[Jason Fry]], "its inclusion shouldn't be taken as a statement of canonicity for anything except the geography."<ref name="Jason">{{JCFCite|url=posts/29648348|board=Literature|thread=The Essential Atlas and Galactic Cartography: Official Discussion|user=[[Jason Fry|jasonfry]]|date=2009-01-04|time=7:52 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200714135715/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-essential-atlas-and-galactic-cartography-official-discussion.21938930/page-72}}</ref>
